title: 🏁 Submission & Judging
passage: <document version="2.0"><paragraph>Our judges will evaluate projects across four key dimensions:</paragraph><list style="unordered"><list-item><paragraph><bold>✨ Creativity:</bold> How original and exciting is your idea?</paragraph></list-item><list-item><paragraph><bold>🧠 Technical Depth:</bold> How effectively does your project use AI or LLM capabilities?</paragraph></list-item><list-item><paragraph><bold>🎨 User Experience:</bold> Is it intuitive, well-presented, or engaging to interact with?</paragraph></list-item><list-item><paragraph><bold>🚀 Execution:</bold> How polished, functional, and complete is your 3-hour prototype?</paragraph></list-item></list><paragraph>Bonus points for great teamwork and a clear, confident demo!</paragraph></document>
